stemHtml: Is it permitted for an aircraft to carry explosives on board?

options.a: They are forbidden to be transported by air.
options.b: If they are prepared for flight and stowed in different compartments, then they can fly.
options.c: They can be transported in cargo aircraft with DG approval only.
options.d: If they are substances allowed according to the ICAO Technical Instructions, then they can be carried on passenger aircraft.
